title: JANICE Puppet Workshop
summary: Build and test digital puppets with skeletons, outfits, accessories, and moves.
description: A browser-safe JANICE schema lab for animatable digital puppets, starting with a green-loving runway model and a very different test character.
dateSource: project scaffold and JANICE schema implementation

safety.privacy: Local-only play with no accounts, chat, sharing, uploads, saved data, analytics, or remote services.
safety.adultHelp: None required for digital play; adult help may be useful later if printable craft templates are added.
safety.notes: Dress-up and posing are expressive, not ranked. There are no scores, timers, streaks, public posting, or body/beauty judgments.
